meaning: n.诱惑者,骗子,玩弄女性的色情骗子
examples: What was the name of this vile seducer ?
This man is active and self-confident; a "Don Juan"-type seducer.
If you want to experience what its like to become a natural seducer.
Bond is not only a master spy and seducer, he is also a style icon.
But what is truly memorable about him in Sir Michael's account is his performance as a serial seducer.
